nasb.text: In the first year of his reign, in the first month, he opened the doors of the house of the Lord and repaired them.

esv.text: In the first year of his reign, in the first month, he opened the doors of the house of the Lord and repaired them.

cnv.text: 他在位的元年正月，開了耶和華殿的門，重新修理。

ccb.text: 希西迦元年一月，他开启耶和华殿的门，重新修理。
